tools.name: repos_get
tools.description: The `parent` and `source` objects are present when the repository is a fork. Returns: { id: integer, name: string, full_name: string, owner: object, ... }

owner.description: The account owner of the repository.

repo.description: The name of the repository without the `.git` extension.

tools.name: repos_delete
tools.description: Delete a repository

tools.name: repos_update
tools.description: Update a repository. Returns: { id: integer, name: string, full_name: string, owner: object, ... }

description.description: A short description of the repository.

tools.name: repos_getcontent
tools.description: Get repository content. Returns: { type: string, name: string, path: string, sha: string, ... }

tools.name: repos_listbranches
tools.description: List branches. Returns: object[]

tools.name: repos_listcommits
tools.description: List commits. Returns: object[]

sha.description: SHA or branch to start listing commits from.

path.description: Only commits containing this file path will be returned.

tools.name: repos_listreleases
tools.description: List releases. Returns: object[]

tools.name: repos_createrelease
tools.description: Create a release. Returns: { id: integer, tag_name: string, name: string, body: string, ... }

tools.description: Get the authenticated user. Returns: { id: integer, login: string, avatar_url: string, html_url: string, ... }

tools.description: Get a user. Returns: { id: integer, login: string, avatar_url: string, html_url: string, ... }

tools.description: List repositories for a user. Returns: object[]

tools.description: List repository issues. Returns: object[]

labels.description: A list of comma separated label names.

tools.description: Create an issue. Returns: { id: integer, number: integer, title: string, body: string, ... }

tools.description: Get an issue. Returns: { id: integer, number: integer, title: string, body: string, ... }

tools.description: Update an issue. Returns: { id: integer, number: integer, title: string, body: string, ... }

tools.description: List issue comments. Returns: object[]

tools.description: Create an issue comment. Returns: { id: integer, body: string, user: object, html_url: string, ... }

tools.description: List pull requests. Returns: object[]

tools.description: Create a pull request. Returns: { id: integer, number: integer, title: string, body: string, ... }

tools.description: Get a pull request. Returns: { id: integer, number: integer, title: string, body: string, ... }
